message:
Add multi-concept AND search for finding conversations matching all terms

Usage:
  episodic-memory search "React Router" "authentication" "JWT"

Finds conversations that semantically match ALL provided concepts.

How it works:
- Searches each concept independently (vector similarity)
- Finds intersection of results (conversations appearing in all sets)
- Ranks by average similarity across all concepts
- Shows individual similarity per concept

Output format:
  1. [project, date] - 45% avg match
     Concepts: React Router: 60%, authentication: 30%
     "snippet..."
     path.jsonl:10-15

Enables precision queries:
- "WebFetch" "documentation" "API" - all three must match
- "React Router" "testing" "vitest" - conversations at intersection
- Better than OR (too broad) or single term (too vague)

Tests: 71/71 passing including 4 multi-concept tests
